title: Order Timeline's groupings
excerpt:

posts.author: DanieleRadicalbit (Daniele)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I am currently working on a table that includes an overview of all our marketing efforts. I need the table to be displayed as a timeline, grouping the activities based on a certain label (detailing the area of the activity).
The rows created by the “group by” feature in the timeline seem to be randomly ordered (from up to down). Is there a way to set a fixed order, so that I can display the most important actions at the top of the timeline?

Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Daniele!

You mention that you’re grouping activities based on certain labels - are these labels stemming from a status column? I ask this as I wonder if you could take advantage of the sort feature, to sort by the status label? Alternatively, you could set up a priority column (which is also a status column) and sort by priority of tasks? Could this work for you?

posts.author: FNL (Francis Nadeau Lussier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Jumping on this thread to see if there might be plans to offer some way to order grouping using people or dropdown columns also?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Francis!

There are tentative plans to release this type of feature at the end of the quarter - stay tuned

posts.author: paulmatsushima (Paul Matsushima)
posts.cookedHtml: @BiancaT - was this feature request ever implemented? You said by the end of the quarter, which I assume would be around Sept 2023…

posts.author: williamn (william noto)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m curious about this too. I’ve got a dashboard that consolidates > 10 boards using a timeline widget. I need them to be in a specific order, but I can’t control that order unless I just create multiple Timeline widgets. The challenge with multiple Timeline widgets is that they zoom and scroll horizontally independently of one another. It’d be nice if I could either lock their horizontal scrolls and zooms to one another OR better to be able to sort the boards according to my whims.

posts.author: jake.armstrong (Jake Armstrong)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve run into this issue as well. Are there plans to make this a feature at all? It would be super helpful when bringing multiple boards into a dashboard timeline view.
